product_description: A mobile app that scans old coins, identifies coin details, and shows an estimated reference value range for collection research.
brief:
Create a vertical 20-second direct-response ad for a coin scanner app.

Story:
A foreign/Western-looking adult male actor finds one old coin on a table. He picks it up with curiosity and wonders what coin it is. He opens the app, scans both sides of the coin, then sees a result screen showing coin details and an estimated reference value range. He reacts with surprised excitement, turns the phone toward the camera so the result screen is readable, then points downward for the download CTA.

Visual requirements:
Use one primary male actor only. Do not show any second person. Keep the actor consistent across all scenes. Use a warm tabletop home setting. Preserve the uploaded app screenshots exactly, especially the yellow UI, scan screen, capture button, and result/detail screen.

Voice:
English spoken dialogue, natural UGC style. Include the Spanish phrase â€œÂ¡Mira esto!â€ only in the reaction scene.

CTA:
Download now.

Claims to avoid:
Do not say guaranteed value, appraisal, payout, auction, sale, authentication, counterfeit detection, or that the app replaces professional grading. Treat any price shown as an estimated reference range only.

vision_analysis.detected_visual_style: Clean, modern, and functional design with a focus on clear information display. Utilizes flat design principles with prominent iconography and a warm yellow/gold accent color for interactive elements.
detected_ui_elements: Buttons (Coin Identify, Tap to Claim, Save to My Coins)
Text fields for details and values
detected_text: Tap here to recognize a coins
Commemorative Coins, Precious Coins, Dollar Coins, Modern Coins
Note: The coin's actual value can vary based on its condition, shape, rarity, and other factors. This is only an approximate estimate.
notes: The app's primary function of scanning and identifying coins is clearly represented through the UI, especially the central camera button and the detail screens.
The yellow/gold color is consistently used for key interactive elements and highlights, aligning with the brief's requirement to preserve the yellow UI.
The app displays detailed information about coins, including estimated reference values, which aligns with the product description.

visibleElements: Buttons (Coin Identify, Tap to Claim, Save to My Coins)
Text fields for details and values
productAnalysis.coreBenefit: Identifies old coins, provides detailed information, and shows an estimated reference value range for collection research.
doNotAssume: That the app replaces professional grading
productAnalysis.productLockPrompt: Preserve the exact yellow UI, scan screen, capture button, and result/detail screen as shown in the provided app screenshots.

productReferences.name: App Home Screen
productReferences.visualDescription: The home screen of the Coin Scanner App, featuring a large image of a Lincoln Cent, a prominent yellow 'Coin Identify' button, a camera icon at the bottom, and a search bar at the top. The UI uses yellow/gold accents.
productReferences.lockPrompt: Preserve the exact layout, yellow UI, and prominent 'Coin Identify' button/camera icon of this home screen.
productReferences.useWhen: When introducing the app or preparing for a scan.

productReferences.name: App Coin Detail Screen
productReferences.visualDescription: The detail screen of the Coin Scanner App, showing front and back images of a '1909-S VDB Lincoln Cent', with tabs for 'Overview', 'Reference Price', 'Rarity', and 'Value'. The 'Reference Price' section displays a range of '$100,000 - $500,000' and a disclaimer about estimated value. The UI maintains yellow/gold accents.
productReferences.lockPrompt: Preserve the exact layout, coin images, details, estimated reference price range, and yellow UI of this detail screen.
productReferences.useWhen: When displaying the scan results, estimated value, or for the call to action.

primaryCharacter.name: Adult Male Actor
primaryCharacter.description: A foreign/Western-looking adult male, mid-30s to 40s, with a curious and approachable demeanor.
primaryCharacter.imagePrompt: A foreign/Western-looking adult male, mid-30s to 40s, with short brown hair and a light stubble, wearing a casual long-sleeve shirt, looking curious and approachable. Vertical shot, warm lighting.
primaryCharacter.consistencyPrompt: The same foreign/Western-looking adult male, mid-30s to 40s, with short brown hair and light stubble, wearing the same casual long-sleeve shirt.

primaryLocation.name: Warm Tabletop Home Setting
primaryLocation.description: A cozy, well-lit home setting with a warm wooden tabletop as the central surface. The background is slightly blurred, suggesting a comfortable living room or study.
primaryLocation.imagePrompt: A warm, inviting home setting with a polished wooden tabletop in the foreground, bathed in soft, natural light from an unseen window. A few subtle, tasteful decorative items (e.g., a small plant, a book) are arranged neatly on the table. The background shows a hint of a living room or study, slightly out of focus. Natural three-quarter commercial view.
primaryLocation.consistencyPrompt: The same warm tabletop home setting, maintaining the fixed layout of the wooden table, its relationship to background elements, the direction of soft natural light, and the consistent appearance of subtle decorative props from various camera angles.

scenes.title: Curious Coin Find
scenes.sceneGoal: Establish the character and his initial curiosity about an old coin, setting up the problem the app solves.
scenes.visualAction: Actor discovers an old coin on a table, picks it up, and examines it with a puzzled expression.
scenes.productMoment: The old coin is the focus, hinting at the app's purpose.
scenes.characterAction: Actor enters frame, spots the coin, picks it up, turns it over in his fingers, and looks at it intently with curiosity.
scenes.locationUse: The warm tabletop is where the coin is found and examined.

camera.composition: Actor's hands and face are visible, focusing on the coin.

voiceLines.speaker: Primary actor
voiceLines.line: Hmm, what is this old coin? I wonder where it came from.

scenes.ambientAudio: Gentle room tone, subtle sound of coin being picked up and handled.
timingBeats: 0-2s: Actor spots and picks up an old coin from the warm wooden tabletop.
2-4s: Actor examines the coin closely, turning it over in his fingers with a curious, puzzled expression.

keyframePrompts.label: Actor and product setup
keyframePrompts.purpose: To establish the primary character, primary location, and the initial discovery of the coin.
keyframePrompts.prompt: A foreign/Western-looking adult male actor, mid-30s to 40s, with short brown hair and light stubble, wearing a casual long-sleeve shirt, picking up an old coin from a warm wooden tabletop in a cozy home setting, looking curious. Medium shot, eye-level.

scenes.title: Discovering the App
scenes.sceneGoal: Introduce the Coin Scanner App as the solution to identifying the coin.
scenes.visualAction: Actor pulls out his phone, opens the Coin Scanner App, and navigates to the scan screen.

scenes.characterAction: Actor pulls out phone, unlocks it, taps to open the app, and holds it ready for scanning.
scenes.locationUse: Actor is seated at the warm tabletop, phone in hand.

camera.composition: Phone screen with app UI is clearly visible and readable.

voiceLines.speaker: Primary actor
voiceLines.actionState: opening the app on his phone
voiceLines.line: Wait, I remember hearing about an app for this! Let's see...

timingBeats: 0-2s: Actor pulls out his smartphone and unlocks it.
2-4s: Actor opens the Coin Scanner App, showing the home screen with the prominent yellow UI and camera button (file_d1e0bddf1506).

scenes.title: Scanning with Ease
scenes.sceneGoal: Demonstrate the app's core functionality: scanning both sides of a coin.
scenes.visualAction: Actor places the coin on the table and uses the app's camera to scan both sides.
scenes.productMoment: The app's scan screen with the capture button is visible during the scanning process.
scenes.characterAction: Actor carefully places the coin on the tabletop, positions the phone over it, taps the scan button, flips the coin, and scans the other side.
scenes.locationUse: The coin is scanned directly on the warm tabletop.

camera.composition: Phone screen and coin are clearly visible.
alternatives: top-down shot of phone and coin

voiceLines.speaker: Primary actor
voiceLines.line: Okay, just place it here... scan the front... and now the back. So simple!

scenes.ambientAudio: Camera shutter sound, subtle UI clicks.
timingBeats: 0-2s: Actor positions the phone over the coin on the warm tabletop, showing the app's scan interface with the prominent yellow capture button.
2-4s: Actor taps the capture button, flips the coin, and scans the second side with the app.

keyframePrompts.label: Scanning coin back

keyframePrompts.prompt: An over-the-shoulder close-up of the same foreign/Western-looking adult male actor's hands, now having flipped the old coin, scanning the second side with the Coin Scanner App's camera interface on the smartphone. The yellow capture button is prominent.
